username.title: Username
username.rules: Username must be 3 to 20 characters. Use letters, numbers, underscore or hyphen.
username.helper: 3-20 characters. Letters, numbers, underscore or hyphen. It must be unique.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.warning: This action will delete your account and you will lose the progress linked to it. It cannot be undone.

auth.passwordRequirements: Password must have at least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number and one symbol.

troubleshooting.title: KNOWN ERROR LOG
troubleshooting.subtitle: Known app anomalies and available workarounds. Fixes are still being worked through.

incidents.title: Search Match Isolation
incidents.symptom: When searching shared terms in Missions / Kappa, such as "Crisis", the app filters correctly but may first expose only one visible match inside the active trader.
incidents.fix: If you are searching for a quest with a common or shared name, type the word in the search box and review the different trader tabs to see all matches.

incidents.title: Local Progress in Guest Mode
incidents.symptom: If you use the app without logging in, quest progress is saved in localStorage. It can be lost after clearing browser data, using aggressive cleanup, incognito mode or switching device.
incidents.fix: Create an account and log in to save progress in Supabase. Guest mode still works, but it should not be treated as permanent persistence.

incidents.title: External API Dependency
incidents.symptom: Server status, live events, Goons Tracker, Flea Market and some Kappa data depend on external sources. If an API, proxy or external site fails, the module may show empty data, old data or a temporary error.
incidents.fix: Try again after a few minutes and check your connection. Live Events includes a manual fallback when automatic sources do not respond.

incidents.title: Goons Tracker Reading
incidents.symptom: Goons Tracker extracts information from external HTML. If the source site changes its structure, the app may not detect the active map correctly.
incidents.fix: If a capture error appears or the map does not look reliable, validate the data with the original source until the parser is updated.

incidents.title: Partial Interface Translation
incidents.symptom: The ES/EN selector already works on the home screen, login, Report, Account, Server Status and Missions / Kappa, but several internal modules still keep hardcoded Spanish text.
incidents.fix: Translation is being rolled out in phases. Current priority: admin panel and main modules.

incidents.title: Technical Debt Detected by Lint
incidents.symptom: The production build compiles correctly, but ESLint detects technical debt in several modules: effects with immediate setState, pending hook dependencies and small unnecessary assignments or escapes.
incidents.fix: It does not block current app usage, but should be fixed before a serious public deploy to reduce extra render risk and future hard-to-trace bugs.

incidents.title: Hideout Local Fallback
incidents.symptom: ESLint reports that the local Hideout fallback is referenced before declaration. The app can compile, but this structure is fragile if data loading is touched.
incidents.fix: Move the fallback helper before the effect or convert it into a stable callback during the next Hideout cleanup pass.

liveEvents.title: Live events
liveEvents.subtitle: Scans tarkovdata sources, classifies active or recent events and keeps a manual reference if the external feed fails.
liveEvents.empty: No active or recent events are registered right now.

errors.manualActive: The automatic feed returned no events, but there is a manually verified temporary event.
errors.noFeed: The automatic feed could not be confirmed. Showing a manual reference link.
errors.unexpected: Unexpected error while reading events. Showing a manual reference link.

fallback.title: Escape From Tarkov Events
fallback.description: No active event could be confirmed from automatic sources. Use the external link as a manual reference.

fullSpeedAhead.description: Active event with Rogues outside Lighthouse, presence on Shoreline and Reserve, Peacekeeper quest chain and Awaiting Departure achievement.

storyModule.title: STORY DECISIONS
storyModule.subtitle: All routes, decisions and points of no return you should track to reach the different Tarkov story endings.
storyModule.armoredCaseQuestion: What do you do with the Armored Case?
storyModule.kermanQuestion: Work with Kerman or refuse Kerman?

fallingSkies.title: FALLING SKIES
fallingSkies.body: Progress through the Falling Skies chapter.

armoredCase.title: RECOVER ARMORED CASE
armoredCase.body: Recover the Armored Case from the crashed plane in Woods.

armoredChoices.prapor: OPTION: HAND IT OVER TO PRAPOR

keepPath.title: CONTAINER IN YOUR HANDS
keepPath.body: The Armored Case is in your hands. You move directly toward opening it.

praporPath.connectionTitle: THE ARMORED CASE IS IN YOUR HANDS

lighthouse.label: Lighthouse
lighthouse.body: Find compromising material about Prapor on Lighthouse.

access.label: Access requirement
access.body: Gain access to Lightkeeper. Network Provider 1 must be available.

bribe.label: Trade bribe
bribe.body: Talk to Lightkeeper and pay him three TerraGroup Blue Folders.

signal.label: Signal
signal.body: Fire a yellow flare in front of Ultra Mall on Interchange.

raidCondition.label: Raid condition
raidCondition.body: Kill 15 targets without dying in the same flare raid.

pickup.label: Pickup
pickup.body: Collect the Armored Case from Lightkeeper. It is stored in the special slot.

containerOpening.decryptBody: Find the Signal Jammer in LABS.

kermanChoices.noKerman: BRANCH: DO NOT WORK WITH KERMAN

noKerman.easyWayBody: Go to the port entrance, use the intercom and swipe the Keycard.
noKerman.terminalBody: Card rejected. Ask Prapor for help finding an alternative.
noKerman.standby: System on standby. Activate calculation to project the escape window.
noKerman.terminalPathBody: Go to Shoreline between 21:00 and 06:00, use the tower intercom and swipe the Keycard. Approach the Terminal gate without a weapon in your hands and begin your escape attempt.
noKerman.terminalRetry: If the attempt fails, you will need to buy a new note from Prapor for 5M roubles.

prapor.title: FEE: 300M ROUBLES
prapor.body: Prapor asks for 300M roubles if you gave him the Armored Case. In return, he gives you a note for Terminal soldiers.

keep.title: FEE: 500M ROUBLES + CONDITIONS
keep.body: Prapor asks for 500M roubles if you did not give him the Armored Case. He also demands timed tasks.
items: Find 4 TerraGroup Report Folders in LABS.
Give Prapor the Flash Drive with data.
Kill 50 targets in Streets of Tarkov.
Kill 4 PMCs and survive in a single raid.

labs.label: LABS infiltration
labs.body: Search for the Masterkeycard and RFID device in LABS.

mechanic.label: Mechanic help
mechanic.body: If the RFID is missing, talk to Mechanic and pay him 40 Bitcoins.

streets.label: Streets
streets.body: Get Elektroniks' key and go to his apartment on Streets to recover the RFID.

rfid.label: RFID card activation
rfid.body: Activate the RFID card from the Armored Case and swipe it at the port reader.

evidenceChoices.fullEvidence: OPTION A: GIVE ALL EVIDENCE TO KERMAN
evidenceChoices.lightkeeperTurn: OPTION A-2: GIVE 2 EVIDENCE ITEMS AND SIDE WITH LIGHTKEEPER
evidenceChoices.noEvidence: OPTION B: REFUSE TO HELP KERMAN

items: Build Intelligence Center level 3 in the Hideout.
Hand over all 8 Major Evidence items to Kerman.
Reach Fence reputation 4.0.
Raise BTR Driver reputation to 0.4.
Build Solar Power in the Hideout.
Craft the blank RFID in Intelligence Center level 3.
Final raid: Shoreline between 21:00 and 06:00, intercom, Keycard and Terminal gate unarmed.
Build Intelligence Center level 3 in the Hideout.
Give only 2 Major Evidence items to Kerman and cut ties.
Find 5 reconnaissance maps.
Hand a special Flash Drive to Lightkeeper.
Kill 30 PMCs in Woods and hand over 100 PMC dogtags.
Locate Cultist Amulets in Marked Rooms.
Lightkeeper gives you the Terminal Keycard.
Final raid: Shoreline between 21:00 and 06:00, intercom, Keycard and unarmed gate approach.

history.prapor: Past actions: you gave the Armored Case to Prapor. He returns it after recovering it from Lightkeeper without extra penalties.
history.keep: Past actions: you did not give the Case to Prapor. He demands Repair Kits, a secure container and Military Components.

items: Do not hand over any evidence to Kerman.
Go talk to Prapor.
Recover the briefcase with dangerous cargo and hand it to Prapor.
Pay Prapor 1,000,000 dollars.
Prapor gives you a USB with Hash codes.
Build Solar Power in the Hideout.
Craft the blank RFID in Intelligence Center level 3.
Final raid: Shoreline between 21:00 and 06:00, intercom, Keycard and Terminal unarmed.

survivor.title: SURVIVOR ENDING
survivor.body: You ran hoping to escape, but the city burned behind you. You survived, though Tarkov was left in ashes.

savior.title: SAVIOR ENDING
savior.body: You escaped Tarkov for humanity. The strike against TerraGroup exposed its secrets and released the truth.

debtor.title: DEBTOR ENDING
debtor.body: You escaped Tarkov, but not yourself. You switched sides and remained tied to a debt that is hard to erase.

fallen.title: FALLEN ENDING
fallen.body: You escaped Tarkov only to fall into darkness. TerraGroup survived and the world began to crack.

prestigeModule.title: Prestige
prestigeModule.subtitle: Requirements, rewards and a local checklist for preparing each prestige level. The prestige system is only available in PVP mode.
prestigeModule.summaryBody: {{done}} of {{total}} requirements marked. Required money is shown separately because it is not tracked automatically.
prestigeModule.noteBody: Requirements can change with patches. Base data was checked against the official Escape From Tarkov Wiki.
